    Job Description

    Sr. Applied AI Engineer

    Company: AssetWatch, Inc.

    Location: Dublin, OH (Remote)

    Machine Learning & Artificial Intelligence

    Salary: $100.70K - $138.30K/yr

    Job Type: Full-time

    Benefits: Retirement, PTO

    Responsibilities:

    • Design and build end-to-end LLM-powered workflows.
    • Rapidly prototype internal AI assistants and automation tools.
    • Develop shared connectors to major LLM providers and internal data sources.
    • Create reusable agent templates and AI development patterns.
    • Partner with data  science teams to operationalize models.
    • Communicate architectural decisions to stakeholders.

    Qualifications:

    • BS in Computer  Science, Engineering, Mathematics, or related field.
    • 6+ years of professional  software or machine learning engineering experience.
    • Proficiency in Python and SQL.
    • Experience developing LLM-powered applications and working with vector databases.
    • Familiarity with agent frameworks or orchestration libraries.

    Preferred:

    • Experience building internal AI tooling or developer enablement frameworks.
    • Familiarity with cloud environments (AWS preferred) and containerization (Docker).

    Ready to Apply?

    This position is open and accepting applications. Click the button below to apply directly on the company's website.

    Please mention that you found this job on chatgpt-jobs. This helps us get more companies to post here!
